principle: Normalized model inputs must cite tool-derived evidence. Default model alignment is candidate-level, not a hand-built fine-grained relationship graph. Missing tool proof is represented as UNKNOWN, not hand-normalized source text.

source_window.normalization_policy: Raw source is preserved for audit; no semantic normalization is inferred from raw source alone.

ast_expression_facts.fallback_policy: Emit no tool-proven expression row, or emit UNKNOWN when a required expression cannot be rendered by the tool.

object_identity_facts.fallback_policy: Use UNKNOWN_OBJECT_ID unless a tool exposes the object expression, value-flow identity, alias set, or graph node.

operation_role_facts.fallback_policy: Coccinelle bounded-window matches are supporting operation evidence unless a rule explicitly allows promotion.

wrapper_candidate_operation_facts.fallback_policy: Wrapper-candidate matches are parser-backed hints only. They must use trust_level=wrapper_candidate_only and cannot promote labels without a separate wrapper rule policy.

control_flow_order_facts.fallback_policy: Graph availability may be recorded, but candidate-local order claims require parsed CFG/order edges.

alias_dataflow_facts.fallback_policy: Use missing_required_tool_input until bitcode/dataflow artifacts exist.

callback_graph_facts.fallback_policy: Use missing_required_tool_input until callbacks, async enqueue sites, and handler targets are tool-resolved.

accepted_tools: VulnSignal rule runner over CodeQL, Coccinelle, Joern, SVF, and oracle evidence
vulnerability_rule_instances.fallback_policy: Rule instances may be conditional; unresolved object identity prevents promotion beyond the rule's recorded strength.

vulnerability_rule_validation.fallback_policy: Record required-view pass/fail/UNKNOWN so label promotion is auditable.

optional_tool_proven_relationship_edges.fallback_policy: Do not require explicit relationship edges for default training or inference. Add them only when a tool produces them and treat them as auxiliary validation evidence.
